title: Add Gmail and mobile number to Contact section

requirements.summary: Add Gmail address khushpal1011@gmail.com and mobile number +91 8527230903 as clickable links in the Contact section and Footer
acceptanceCriteria: The email address khushpal1011@gmail.com appears in the Contact section as an <a href='mailto:khushpal1011@gmail.com'> link.
The phone number +91 8527230903 appears in the Contact section as an <a href='tel:+918527230903'> link.
Both the email and phone number are also displayed in the Footer.
Clicking the email link opens the user's email client with khushpal1011@gmail.com as the recipient.
Clicking the phone link initiates a call to +91 8527230903 on supported devices.
Styling is consistent with the existing black and red theme.

file_operations.description: Add the Gmail address khushpal1011@gmail.com as a clickable mailto: link in the contact information area. Ensure the existing phone number +91 8527230903 is displayed as a clickable tel: link. Position both contact details prominently near the working hours section. Use consistent styling with the existing black and red theme (text-red-500 for highlights, hover states with hover:text-red-400).

Add the Gmail address khushpal1011@gmail.com as a clickable mailto: link in the Footer's contact information area. Ensure the phone number +91 8527230903 is also present as a clickable tel: link. Display both below or near the existing working hours. Apply consistent styling using the black and red theme (text-gray-400 for base text, hover:text-red-500 for interactive states).
